items.text: COM component shall define an internal state variable Mode
items.fragment: COM component shall define an internal state variable Mode
items.requirement_fragment: COM component shall define an internal state variable Mode

items.text: The value of Mode shall be calculated based on the control panel signals received on the Panel input port
items.fragment: The value of Mode shall be calculated based on the control panel signals received on the Panel input port
items.requirement_fragment: The value of Mode shall be calculated based on the control panel signals received on the Panel input port

items.text: CMD output value is strictly equal to the theoretical brake command computed from the current brake mode (Mode) and the pedal pressure value received on the Pedal input port
items.fragment: CMD output value is strictly equal to the theoretical brake command computed from the current brake mode (Mode) and the pedal pressure value received on the Pedal input port
items.requirement_fragment: CMD output value is strictly equal to the theoretical brake command computed from the current brake mode (Mode) and the pedal pressure value received on the Pedal input port
